title: Volatile Blaze Powder
description: An alternative to Dragon's Breath for Lingering Potions
body: An alternative to Dragon's Breath for Lingering Potions pre-End Dragon fight. Combining Blaze Powder, Phantom Membrane, and a Amethyst Shard will give you Volatile Blaze Powder. Combined with a Bottle and Bucket of Water will give you Dragon's Breath.
